app.script:
df <- subset(get.input(), !is.na(time_s))
df$velocity_mean_m_s <- rowMeans(df[c("velocity_1_m_s", "velocity_2_m_s", "velocity_3_m_s")], na.rm = TRUE)
df$velocity_sd_m_s <- apply(df[c("velocity_1_m_s", "velocity_2_m_s", "velocity_3_m_s")], 1, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
fit <- lm(velocity_mean_m_s ~ time_s, data = df)
set.paper_style(mar = c(4.2, 4.2, 2.1, 0.8))
plot(df$time_s, df$velocity_mean_m_s,
  pch = 19, col = "#7e22ce", cex = 1.15,
  xlab = "Time / s", ylab = "Mean velocity / m s^-1",
  main = "Velocity-time graph"
)
add.paper_guides(show_grid = TRUE)
arrows(df$time_s, df$velocity_mean_m_s - df$velocity_sd_m_s,
  df$time_s, df$velocity_mean_m_s + df$velocity_sd_m_s,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.04
)
abline(fit, col = "#374151", lwd = 2)
print(df[c("time_s", "velocity_mean_m_s", "velocity_sd_m_s")])
cat(sprintf("Estimated acceleration: %.2f m/s^2\n", coef(fit)[2]))

runtimeStatus.text: サンプルを読み込みました
